problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
